content: [implement-1] Create unified multi-provider AI service supporting Anthropic, OpenAI, and Gemini
[implement-2] Implement Best Models Mode that auto-selects optimal models per task
[implement-3] Update database schema and types for new model providers
[implement-4] Update client UI with provider tabs and Best Models Mode toggle
[implement-5] Add OpenAI and Gemini API keys to .env.example
[implement-6] Update server package.json with openai and google-genai deps
[implement-7] Install dependencies and run TypeScript checks
